name: langsmith-evals
description: Engenharia e auditoria de evals agenticos LangSmith-first: datasets, evaluators, experiments, backtests e gates de promocao.

interface.shortDescription: Projeta, executa e audita evals no LangSmith.
interface.longDescription: Usa LangSmith como control plane para datasets, experiments, feedback e backtests, preservando pytest e oraculos deterministicos. Inclui agentes Engineer e Auditor com papeis separados.
defaultPrompt: /langsmith-evals desenhe e execute o eval deste agente
/langsmith-evals audite os experiments e emita GO/NO-GO
